headline: Walmart's new partnership brings iconic beauty brand to stores
summary: Legend has it that in 1400, a horse suffering from eczema walked into thermal springs near the village of La Roche-Posay, France, and was instantly cured of its skin disorder. headline: Is Dollar General open on Easter?
summary: If you feel like Easter gets a little more expensive every year, you aren’t alone. New data from the National Retail Federation shows that consumer spending on Easter is expected to hit a record high of $24.9 billion this year.
